classifications.phrase: increase the cash rate target by 25 basis points
at 7 per cent is still too high
a further increase in interest rates was warranted today
services price inflation is still very high and broadly based
Unit labour costs are also rising briskly
the labour market remains very tight
unemployment rate at a near 50-year low
Todays further adjustment in interest rates will help
Some further tightening of monetary policy may be required
the path to achieving a soft landing remains a narrow one

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance on inflation control through rate increases and warnings about persistent price pressures, while acknowledging dovish growth concerns regarding below-trend economic expansion and household consumption weakness.
